# Photography Website Project

## Project Overview
A vanilla HTML/CSS/JavaScript photography website with:
- Photo gallery with lightbox
- Portfolio showcase
- Contact form
- Admin dashboard

## Tech Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (Plain CSS)
- Vanilla JavaScript (ES6+)

## Features
- Responsive design
- Image lightbox viewer
- Portfolio categorization
- Contact form with validation
- Admin panel for photo management
- Local storage for admin data

## Project Structure
- `/assets/css/` - Stylesheets
- `/assets/js/` - JavaScript files
- `/assets/images/` - Image assets (placeholders)
- `/admin/` - Admin dashboard
- `index.html` - Landing page
- `gallery.html` - Photo gallery
- `portfolio.html` - Portfolio showcase
- `contact.html` - Contact page

## Setup Instructions
All files are ready to use. Open `index.html` in a browser to view the website.

## Development
- Use Live Server (VS Code extension) for local development
- No build tool or dependencies required
- Pure client-side implementation
